objective: Test whether strategy-conditioned QLoRA posttraining can make K=32 sampling more complementary and recover the coverage currently obtained by a multi-policy sampling union at lower forward-token cost.

success_bar.minimum: strategy_lora_k32 recovers more base-missed tasks than hot_k32_baseline at comparable forward-token budget
success_bar.strong: strategy_lora_k32 approaches union_k32_baseline recovery while using materially fewer forward tokens than the union

artifact_policy.large_files: Adapters and any checkpoint-like artifacts live only in the large_artifacts directory.
